title: himantoglossum jankae subsp. calcaratum
intro: Himantoglossum jankae subsp. calcaratum is a type of orchid, a flowering plant belonging to the family Orchidaceae. This orchid is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Himantoglossum jankae subsp. calcaratum include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe sore throats, and alleviate congestion. Herbal preparations of this plant often include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from respiratory issues.
